# 2025-12-13 — Saturday

Clear morning. Ran along the avenida.

Pushed the fix. Ran ollama twice to be sure.

Wrote a test that failed for the right reason. Rare enough to note.

Hiked Sintra on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.

Hiked Bairro Alto on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.

Hiked Alfama on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.

A test that was hard to write is a test I trust.

Half of "rewriting" is deleting.
